highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 upgrades to Skia m151 and delivers allocation-free text shaping improvements.
highlights_body: This preview introduces a wave of performance optimizations across HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper, eliminating per-call heap allocations and using zero-copy spans. It also adds ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads for SKColor, fixes a native resource leak in SKImage, and brings WASM support for .NET 11 via Emscripten 5.

bullets.detail: The bundled Skia engine advances to chrome/m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements and stability fixes backported across three sync passes.
A redefinition of SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM in the Skia submodule was dropped, resolving a build-time warning on WASM targets.

HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 now uses pooled UTF-8 encoding to avoid heap allocation per call, Tag.Parse eliminates a char[4] allocation, and SKShaper reads glyph results via zero-copy spans. SKFourByteTag.Parse receives the same char[4] allocation fix.

bullets.lead: SKColor hex parsing optimized with ReadOnlySpan overloads
bullets.detail: SKColor.Parse and TryParse gain ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads, removing unnecessary string allocations when parsing hex color strings in hot paths.
The unsafe modifier on GRContextOptions has been removed, cleaning up the public API surface without any behavioral change.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData
bullets.detail: SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was leaking a native handle on every call; the handle is now correctly released.
Restoring SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT corrects a CPU raster pipeline regression introduced when syncing to the m151 engine.
New Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries are included, enabling SkiaSharp on WASM targets building against .NET 11.

contributor_summaries.ramezgerges: WASM Emscripten 5 static library support for .NET 11, the Skia submodule drop of the SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM redefinition, and a cross-backend visual regression test harness

preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.1.1: Preview 1 delivered the initial Skia m151 engine upgrade, the first upstream bug-fix sync, and the Skia submodule WASM build fix.
preview_summaries.v4.151.0-preview.2.1: Preview 2 delivered the full wave of allocation-free text shaping improvements across HarfBuzzSharp and SKShaper, SKColor ReadOnlySpan overloads, the GRContextOptions cleanup, the SKImage resource leak fix, and additional m151 upstream syncs.

harfbuzz_summary: HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1 eliminates per-call heap allocations in Buffer.AddUtf8 and Tag.Parse, and adds Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries for .NET 11.
